Container.Name: openclaw-tower
Container.Overview: Custom OpenClaw Tower runtime built from the local GitHub fork and a tiny Tower-specific overlay.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Host port that maps to the OpenClaw gateway inside the container.

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Persistent OpenClaw config/state path on cache.

Config.Name: Workspace Path
Config.Description: Persistent workspace, memory, skills, and project files.

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Optional Docker socket passthrough for local Docker-aware tooling.

Config.Name: BudTrak Data Path
Config.Description: BudTrak data share mounted for Tower-local review and repair tasks.

Config.Name: BudTrak Build Path
Config.Description: Temporary BudTrak build workspace mounted into OpenClaw for local repair flows.

Config.Name: Gateway Password
Config.Description: Gateway password for the Tower OpenClaw runtime.

Config.Name: Google API Key
Config.Description: Used by Gemini-backed memory/embedding paths when configured.

Config.Name: Container Hint
Config.Description: Improves container-targeted CLI guidance inside the runtime.
